page_sub: Weekly yoga classes in Mesa, Arizona — find the right fit for you.
notice: Spring classes begin January 18! Mesa Community College fall semester begins September 9, 2025.
intro: All classes are beginner-friendly and suitable for a wide range of ages and fitness levels. Recorded classes are also available so you can practice on your own time.

classes.location: Mesa Community College — Red Mountain Campus
classes.name: Hatha Flow

hatha_description: Hatha Yoga promotes overall health by strengthening muscles and stimulating the glands and organs. Classes include basic postures, breathing techniques, and relaxation.
gentle_description: Gentle yoga is a slower, more accessible way to practice, appropriate for all ages and fitness levels. A wonderful entry point into yoga.
